def positive_defaultdict_created_with_lambda_instead_of_builtin_factory():
    rule_id = "defaultdict_created_with_lambda_instead_of_builtin_factory"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "defaultdict(lambda: []) or similar lambda factory; use defaultdict(list) or defaultdict(int)."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
